## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have run `pytest` locally and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests covering my changes (or explained why none are needed).
- [ ] I have updated documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`, or `CHANGELOG.md`) where relevant.
- [ ] This PR contains **no** secrets, audiogram data, or other personal information.
- [ ] This PR does **not** introduce hearing-safety regressions (MPO ceilings, output limiters, feedback control are preserved).
